title: Draw Steel Treasure
description: A treasure item (trinket, consumable, leveled item, or artifact) with keywords, project info, and effects.

scc.description: Steel Compendium Classification (SCC) code — the API key and site permalink for this entity (see the SCC scheme spec). Omitted on hand-authored homebrew content that hasn't been classified.

level.description: The level of the treasure item.

echelon.description: Echelon tier the treasure belongs to ("1"–"4"), when applicable.

flavor.description: Italicized flavor text describing the treasure's appearance.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with the treasure (e.g., ["Magic", "Neck"], ["Magic", "Medium Weapon"]).

item_prerequisite.description: Materials required to craft the item (e.g., "A ruby hardened in the fires of the City of Brass").

project_source.description: Where the crafting knowledge comes from (e.g., "Licensing agreements in Anjali").

project_roll_characteristic.description: Characteristic used for the project roll (e.g., "Reason or Intuition").

project_goal.description: Project point goal to complete crafting (e.g., 150, 450). May be a string when the source annotates the goal (e.g. "45 (yields 1d3 darts)").

effect.description: The main effect text of the treasure.

content.description: Raw markdown body of the treasure description.
